steps.title: Track the pivot
steps.content: The text first gives an overview of the exhibition: its museum, its thirty North Carolina artists, and the range of artistic disciplines represented. The final sentence pivots to what makes the exhibition atypical for the Nasher Museum.

steps.title: Reject invented purposes
steps.content: Choice A says the text analyzes the significance of the difference, which it does not. Choice B invents goals and an evaluation of success. Choice D says the text explains why disciplines were included, but it only lists their range. The answer is C.
